title: Pressure system monitoring under hot work
requirement: Pressurised systems near hot work must have monitored pressure with defined alarm response.

title: Flammable gas cylinder / distribution integrity
requirement: Flammable gas distribution near work fronts requires leak detection and isolation readiness.

title: Fugitive emission / toxic release monitoring
requirement: Toxic release pathways must have detection coverage and escalation when readings near threshold.

title: Containment during abnormal operations
requirement: Abnormal operations that can release process fluids require containment readiness (config evidence).
